name: Larry Hamilton Golf
about: Larry Hamilton Golf is a premier indoor golf training facility located in Rochester, MI. The venue features a 5,000 square foot space equipped with TrackMan and FlightScope launch monitor technologies, Callaway club fitting services, swing video analysis, and full club repair and re-gripping services. It is also the home of the Twin Lakes Golf Academy, utilizing the 27 holes of the four-star rated Jerry Matthews designed Twin Lakes Golf & Swim Club course. The facility caters to golfers of all ability levels, offering adult coaching, junior programs like PGA Jr. League, and specialized club fitting services. The environment is designed for focused improvement, particularly during the off-season or when weather is not conducive to outdoor play.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan and FlightScope launch monitor technology for precise swing analysis
Comprehensive club fitting services from a Callaway Master Club Fitter
Indoor facility allows for year-round practice and improvement regardless of weather
Variety of coaching programs for adults and juniors led by a PGA Class A professional

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service.
No mention of on-site alcohol service.

simulator_hardware.notes: TrackMan launch monitor is used for coaching and fitting.
FlightScope launch monitor is used for coaching and fitting.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility offers Callaway club fitting services and club rentals, but players are welcome to bring their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, and no BYOB policy is specified, so it's best to assume outside food and drink are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for a full 18-hole simulator session.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Larry Hamilton Golf offers junior coaching programs including PGA Jr. League and is US Kids Certified, making it suitable for junior golfers.
